scripts.build: pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && pnpm exec vite build
scripts.dev: pnpm run build && pnpm exec electron dist/main/main.js
scripts.test: pnpm exec vitest run --config vite.config.ts src/renderer/App.test.tsx
scripts.typecheck: pnpm exec tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.vite.json
